title: UAF in sqlite3BlobCompare
description:
yongheng added on 2020-02-29 21:41:23:
Consider the following POC:
---
CREATE TABLE v0(v2 FLOAT CHECK(v2 = v2));
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE v3 USING fts4(v5, v6);
INSERT INTO v3(v5) VALUES('X'), (2);
INSERT INTO v0(v2, v2) SELECT zeroblob('199419'), v6 FROM v3
---

It triggers a UAF in debug build of trunk
drh added on 2020-03-02 01:51:38:
This malfunction is in debugging logic only.  The problem was a faulty
assert() statement.  There is no impact on release code.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE v0(v2 FLOAT CHECK(v2 = v2));
CREATE TABLE v3(v5 VARCHAR(255), v6 VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO v0(v2) SELECT CAST(0 AS BLOB) + 1.5;
key_bug_features: UAF in sqlite3BlobCompare during debug build
